seed_policy: The selected OpenAI endpoint exposes no deterministic sampling seed for this runner; pin provider, model, task order, page state, viewport, and repetitions, then report variance rather than inventing determinism.

checkpoints.prompt_template: Sign in with username {{wp_admin_user}} and password {{wp_admin_password}}. From All Posts, open the Tags page. Create exactly these 1 post tags one at a time in the listed order: Rote certification tag 01 (slug rote-certification-tag-01, description “Deterministic certification marker 01.”). For each tag, fill Name, Slug, and Description exactly, click Add New Tag, and wait until the new tag appears before continuing. Do not edit or delete posts, categories, or any other data. There are exactly 1 target tags in this task. Do not infer or create any additional tag. After “Rote certification tag 01” appears in the tag table, immediately conclude success. Independent database verification checks the exact tag names, slugs, descriptions, zero post assignments, and the unchanged 120-post corpus.
